title: CI: enable logformatter
body:
In cirrus we use a custom logformatter that creates nicely formatted/coloured html logs for our tests, re add it and remove cirrus references and figure out how to make the logs available. 

GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY might be an option if we just add the failed test logs there

comments.body: In addition to adding failed tests to GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY, we can use actions-upload-artifact for the prettified log output.

@danishprakash right, my pain here with github is that unlike cirrus you do not get an html web link but just a plain file you have to download and open locally which is more steps that I would like, certainly better than not having it.
Agree, it was quite convenient to have that web link, but it is what it is. I'll take a shot at this.
